## Checklist

- [ ] The PR has one bounded outcome and no unrelated changes.
- [ ] I inspected and preserved existing worktree changes.
- [ ] The change follows the Project Bible and relevant Architecture Bible chapters.
- [ ] Domain, Application, Infrastructure, and Presentation boundaries remain intact.
- [ ] Tests cover relevant success, failure, authorization, and lifecycle behavior.
- [ ] Documentation, diagrams, contracts, and ADRs are current.
- [ ] No credentials, private datasets, generated caches, or sensitive logs are included.
- [ ] Accessibility and bilingual behavior were checked for user-interface changes.
- [ ] Migration, observability, and rollback were considered where applicable.
- [ ] I have read and will follow the Code of Conduct and contributing guide.
